# `defineIndicator.shortName`

> **Stability:** experimental
> **Since:** 0.4

Compact display label for legend chips. Defaults to truncated `name`.

## Signature

```ts
shortName?: string;
```

## Example

```ts
const v: ScriptOverrides["shortName"] = "EMA";
    void v;
```
